name: ns_sly
specialties: AI & Intelligent Systems: Agentic AI Design, RAG Architectures, LLM Orchestration, Prompt Engineering, Semantic Search.
Data & Vector Infrastructure: Vector Embeddings, Data Indexing Strategies, Document Retrieval (ChromaDB, Pinecone, FAISS).

Frontend & Real-time: React.js, Angular, TypeScript, Redux Toolkit, WebSockets (Socket.io), WebRTC.
Systems & Low-Level: C++, Rust (Cargo), Python (uv/poetry), Shell Scripting, Performance Optimization.
Quality & DevOps: CI/CD, AWS (Lambda), RSpec, Jest, Cypress, Technical Specification & Discovery.

education.degree: Bachelor of Technology (B.Tech) in Computer Science / Cyber Security Science
